_comment: generation.generate_chance: float 0.0–1.0. Per-chunk probability gate. 0.0 = never, 0.5 = 50% of candidate chunks (default), 1.0 = every candidate chunk.
Omit the entire 'generation' block to use the default of 0.5.
biomes: Biome tag controlling eligible spawn biomes. Override separately with a datapack tag file.
terrain_adaptation: How vanilla terrain shapes around the structure: none, beard_thin, beard_box, bury, encapsulate.
start_pool: Root jigsaw pool that controls which structure pieces can generate.
size: Jigsaw branch depth — how many additional pieces can connect outward from the starting piece.
start_height: Y offset applied to the spawn position. {absolute: 0} means no offset.
project_start_to_heightmap: Snaps the starting Y to this heightmap before applying start_height. WORLD_SURFACE_WG is standard for surface structures.
max_distance_from_center: Maximum distance in blocks that any jigsaw piece may be placed from the structure origin.
